utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six items. Now, check if each one is fully specified: (1) property — includes type, location, price, features, maintenance fees, taxes, and move-in date, so fully detailed; (2) financing — includes method, status, and home_equity_used, sufficient detail for terms; (3) legal_services — includes provider, cost, currency, included services, and payment schedule, fully detailed; (4) moving_services — includes provider_type, cost, currency, included services, special handling, and timeline, fully specified; (5) setup_services — includes utilities and accessibility consultation, sufficient; (6) total_budget — includes detailed cost breakdown and grand total. All six items are present and complete.
